textByHash.64b629c1ef5e178a62c01279406c403ce01e7c5c: Glad to have you with us. I've heard a lot about you from Sir Tiffy. It's Saradomin's will that you're doing!
textByHash.faaa956672cfbb98bddb4856d49c9b9ae09b0735: A very fair point. My apologies.
textByHash.7459a97a536197cea1709e0966405267a96288a6: This power you speak of... You refer to the power found in the Temple of the Eye?
textByHash.90110db07b43e544f7e45d98c64102ba77e93f2d: And this Stone... You really think it can grant Lucien godhood?
textByHash.a8633eb5a6df6277239318e9e1fb1da87fa845fa: Ah, yes. We should have everything we need here to conduct an interrogation.
textByHash.0305af97a48cef60e985d24c28c75ac8eb870649: I reckon that is something I can help with. Silif, do you have the teleorb?
textByHash.a62a4d4453740125a2ade4d92701effd8d8e57b2: , given your experience in the field, I believe you'll be best placed for this task. Take this orb and plant it on one of Lucien's spies.
textByHash.87b84bf848a16cb53bc000c59362b32f1192320c: Not quite. It's a teleorb containing a sophisticated teleport spell that's directly linked to this cell here. Once planted on the spy, we can use it to bring them right to us.
textByHash.3c86c71c99a395299bf2688504f0b9bff3d8a908: If you want, I can teleport you to Draynor Village.
textByHash.1c2566eca697dd018312ecd3d61544b94f0b039e: Very well. Let me know if you change your mind.
textByHash.b3ecf524c0a254a67ad10115c88e28b6dcaa3fc7: Saradomin be with you, my friend. Would you like me to teleport you to Draynor Village?
textByHash.233438ca79f61f0bf01c58d66dea3baa205fd846: Saradomin be with you, my friend. You should head over to Draynor Village and see if you can get that orb planted.
textByHash.ea7ab2852026784dd462f2e82ed1dbcc8016ec5d: Well I shouldn't say too much. Protocol and all that sort of thing. The more you give away, the more your enemies can use against you.
textByHash.88ffde6c0317b4bc5d81b02cd19bd3abc0017e3a: Very true. Well, as you already know, I am a member of the Temple Knights, although I'm not actually a knight myself.
textByHash.b15688c6098e718021c902812bd71ed2722e972c: Normally to have reached my level of seniority, you'd have been knighted long ago. However, I was a priest originally, and technically still am.
textByHash.83b40f971ea7194d0a9b5f645671a88115c74a44: A priest cannot also hold a knighthood, and so I am the one Temple Knight in a leadership role who doesn't have one.
textByHash.3166ee0c3e49a98050dee93d6b36fc1a7b99c3e4: Isn't it just. Our order is known for having a few oddities like that, as I'm sure you yourself are aware. I hear your own recruitment involved a loophole or two.
textByHash.ddcd1504bfcc984b390b9545347d0678984bc81e: The Eye is what we know it as. After the recent rediscovery of the Temple of the Eye, we put a great deal of effort into learning more about it. However, we didn't actually end up finding much.
textByHash.5d4554eb40848f9cb50eb5698624a2dd6cb022d3: All we really know is that Saradomin used it to great effect in the God Wars. With it, he was able to protect this world from the evil of Zamorak.
textByHash.db1ee7496ceb2684df19601f1b36678408662c01: Yes, that is quite a concerning development, but this is the first time I've heard these other names that it has been given. I wonder if there might be a misunderstanding somewhere.
textByHash.12a5f560b82893a9ed259b678d67129ff676a79e: I just think it's important to keep an open mind. With how little is known about the Eye... or Stone if you prefer, we need to be very careful of any misinformation, intentional or otherwise.
textByHash.80f5d38bed5954562533df87e98aef16c61114c7: It is good to be working with her. Saradomin and Armadyl are natural allies. Just as the two of them once opposed Zamorak together, we will now oppose Lucien in the same way.
textByHash.4945c39b914b143661c36e8c4274e209a5bb4ed0: I suppose it's the one thing we can actually give Lucien credit for. He has united us in a way that few others could manage.
textByHash.5f095385a70c8c5bb066d49f25c0ef2fc51ec757: It is refreshing to see a druid that is willing to stand up and take action. However, I do worry he may not have the stomach for this type of work.
textByHash.afa053986739407728b7090601f284d38cd6ffb6: As a Temple Knight yourself, I have no doubt you understand that we sometimes need to make difficult choices for the good of this world.
textByHash.41d49f4931ea8ce3b9e3bbe24cb34782ee7cf4c1: Welcome back. Any luck with that orb?
textByHash.a3e19343aee8f3b0a429f45671ca7dc280d3d414: Saradomin seems to be smiling on our operation so far!
textByHash.08c0056150ab2ca7f91e0cf759b81f4de44c320d: Yes, of course, of course. Now, I believe it's time we invite one of Lucien's friends over for a little chat!
textByHash.e9e561a728017f6e1f73f20efc7315fa17b40973: So we don't have any more? This is a disaster! It should have been clear that old druid was going to be attacked! Why send him in there?
textByHash.ed2494b56d51ea42eb2c224a6a885c66d8992240: I hope we can get a replacement truth serum quickly. This delay is not what we need right now.
textByHash.149d3830b9ebd249a2474d0525711bd51c1a9cce: Saradomin be with you. How are things going with that truth serum?
textByHash.7d1564709f23adbcf4252433f36f2189807e7913: Hmm... Might be worth you going and checking on it.
textByHash.e01ae446cca19fb3a40999a1ba769a07844a4902: Praise Saradomin! May I suggest you be the one to give it to the spy this time so we avoid any more... accidents.
textByHash.be4df16ecff64c06ae76a3f54e7a583419c1f552: Saradomin be with you. How are things going with that spy?
textByHash.0cff2537fe4e79f42e3a16aa939430b7dcb77cde: You'll be wanting to make a sketch no doubt? Charcoal and papyrus are standard equipment in our line of work. There should be some nearby if you need them.
textByHash.ecb7b3d1dd3d3d2a5ea72d998d3bd697f5c091aa: And I'll pass copies on to our spy network. Hopefully we'll have something before long.
textByHash.bf075c3ae1213349ce70922c01e59d69d19d336a: You'll need to make another then. We're going to need that sketch if we're to find this Dark Squall.
textByHash.a2d89469a0564127e6e3bfc389f5edd05260dfdd: Saradomin be with you. I hear Idria has you recruiting more heroes to our cause. You should speak to her if you need help with anything.
textByHash.4a7c94cacae17aec8638ceb9cd8aed257f2fcfe2: Hello there. I believe Idria has more heroes for you to recruit. You should speak to her about the details.
textByHash.126e99d9aa1824c0d1442ea1bc22cb14310bf71b: Ah, there you are. There has been a potential development in our hunt for the Dark Squall, but I am concerned about...
textByHash.7724c8f4d41fdb8d8e52a32170f1474ddb68e365: Hang on... did you hear that?
textByHash.bd7037996eb36804cdf1a8ef8e57f137c02da306: Would you care to explain what's going on?
textByHash.3103fd78e14d4e65de09b869f0f6fcaae78e806d: Does he not speak the common tongue?
textByHash.992142862ceeee4e66b4639b62b154aa981f0527: That's right. We had a reported sighting of someone matching the description of the Dark Squall near the Black Knights' Fortress.
textByHash.67534f3f6e90d18f836acc6628782bff2e7d51c2: Lord Daquarius is a devout Zamorakian. I doubt he would betray his god.
textByHash.5c8119f276550116823a3c7475bb0f03c37a3464: A fair point. Regardless, I sent Silif to investigate, but we lost contact with him shortly after he entered the fortress.
textByHash.b85512f0cb5f584e3b021c9e6abebf67eb939b9c: Good luck. Don't forget to take some sort of disguise with you. I can't see you getting into the fortress otherwise. Oh, and keep an eye out for Silif as well. He may be in need of support.
textByHash.1d25e2bf18f995731eb8d9d01fe7845908e1ee47: If you want, I can speed things up a bit by teleporting you to Ice Mountain.
textByHash.9f2b7a715aa44193aab9cec51ed8eb51fc560c16: Very well. You know where I am if you change your mind.
textByHash.fb2a9e3c780b4b05676a6214458e7aad4dd1b61b: Hello there. Any luck finding Silif or the Dark Squall?
textByHash.3ece3dd485c1529a26f5c790f6963975139039ca: We lost contact with Silif shortly after he entered the Black Knights' Fortress, so I'd suggest you start there.
textByHash.a37cf29f720d98522f98728c8e21e9ea40f13b59: Welcome back. We've already heard about your heroics in those catacombs from Silif. Good work! Thanks to your help, he was able to gather some very useful information for us.
textByHash.c4fcb2040c092de8954f02692b3d561990b1c9f7: Excellent! That could be quite helpful when it comes to enacting our plan.
textByHash.46f7bfa4fcc0228426c240e3f66fb5c00ac32a6d: This is the big one. We believe we are now in a place where we can move against Lucien.
textByHash.efbfc869f5ec92bf8b4358a74976800f89455b00: The task force is already in position, and thanks to the information Silif was able to obtain, we believe we now know where to find Lucien.
textByHash.2cfcc10e47dca82fa9371aca99cbf158f8e12909: Well that's where you come in. We need you to scout out this location and confirm Lucien's presence. Once you have done so, the task force will move in and deal with him.
textByHash.51dcfc4b6347dabc8940d52ca29a1ea485c6a26e: Surok is likely one of the few people who can directly reach Lucien. That orb is presumably how he does it.
textByHash.d3944e44762503b69c3d5df85aef29eadcd5cd0a: Perfect! That's one less thing to worry about. There will be a location within Surok's headquarters where the orb must be used from. Find it and use the orb to reach Lucien.
textByHash.669039afaec764bfc059139320dccda473d09e08: It's likely somewhere in Surok's headquarters. The same place you and Silif found that intelligence.
textByHash.e3189c6dcc70218114b8d05bea49db42583b5b5c: There will be a location within Surok's headquarters where the orb must be used from. Find it and use the orb to reach Lucien.
textByHash.baf7a8e3e8ba5e5fadb371e7e59769fc0e9ad876: Right, I think that covers everything. When you're ready to go, just step inside the cell. We're going to use that teleorb you planted to swap your location with Surok's.
textByHash.9d3716a19d5f2f35ff52df67ace05240d8edff6c: Hello there. When you're ready to go, just step inside the cell. We're going to use that teleorb you planted to swap your location with Surok's.
textByHash.60e17b9c26f56d48f177f59e20ffe234761b5d6f: Are you ready? I'll teleport you as soon as you enter the cell.
textByHash.ca904924cfc7e14615ed11d47953cc1921fb1269: Very well. Just enter the cell when you're ready.
textByHash.81ad0e0ef01218db59901f6b40f4d037582d4077: I fear no amount of preparation would have been enough. We were never going to have a hope against that level of power...
textByHash.3dd058424f62d653f482573b0b9c649119a633c3: My friends, we cannot afford to lose hope now. The situation is dire, but one of our contacts recently reported in with information that may help us turn things around.
textByHash.cbd5213d93e5790ca88ca64d94e4cdc70db9646f: Movario has been sighted entering the caves below Lumbridge Swamp.
textByHash.e9fc0bbcb3e40663c8461e269599a11337ec680e: He was last seen entering a large cavern filled with some mysterious floating lights.
textByHash.71c3fbc838bc5def844d52f8b3fdf55f82d64a17: Saradomin be with you. How goes your mission?
textByHash.54617fbd7176d93232614dd23488c8bd1c35fdd9: According to our contact, he was seen entering a large cavern filled with mysterious floating lights somewhere within the Lumbridge Swamp Caves.
textByHash.7b97884005d51c9dc3660c719addc0c5b67d8cfe: Don't forget to disguise yourself as the Dark Squall before you approach him. We need to convince him you're someone he can trust.
textByHash.46bc2b5da80d959f867279fa7ec4d6e86fdf59be: They will always be remembered, my friend. I've already made arrangements to have statues built in their honour. Everyone will know of their bravery, and their sacrifice.
textByHash.9ab8971435aef0faba3cbfee5ad12563bebf654a: Well keep it up. I have no doubt you'll lead us to success.
textByHash.1804e48592859fa11577d85686383954a4c40d15: A Guthixian temple? Curious... You'd better get back there as soon as you can.
textByHash.f047a9ca392e4df35326637bc93437067df22c4e: You must speak to Idria at once! She has been preparing a party to support you.
textByHash.33ea9e658b0ac4bbefc6ea960af2af3457870c42: , you must return to the temple below Lumbridge! Idria and her Guardians of Armadyl have already departed to support you!
textByHash.3f4c13694a8f9c867f8e5616ddd5d40936648b1a: Well said. When times are darkest, it is all the more important that we continue to look for the light. The Temple Knights stand ready.
textByHash.0815c5c79e9316f1aa27331685cb386f787a27c9: Saradomin be with you. We have a lot to be grateful to you for.
textByHash.6c5a2637f56837e255fbd782883133387836ee1d: But you came very close and you lived to tell the tale. Lucien may have gained the upper hand, but he's not safe by any means.
textByHash.1ed61de63c7cc8eba674f93baef16acead9b0759: He has people like you opposing him, not to mention an alliance between the Temple Knights, Crux Eqal and the Guardians of Armadyl!
